subject: feat(ui): implement actuals-first single-screen dashboard and 3-step import wizard
body:
Replace the old 3-tab budget-first UI with the new actuals-first system:

New components:
- WorkspaceDashboard: single-screen view with cashflow graph, metrics grid,
  and paginated transaction table
- CashflowGraph: ApexCharts line chart showing actuals, forecast, and cash balance
- MetricsGrid/MetricCard: responsive financial metrics (daily income/spend/net,
  monthly spend, transaction count, recurring items, forecast accuracy, runway)
- TransactionTable: paginated, filterable table with search, tag, and
  classification filters
- NewImportWizard: 3-step import (upload → classify → confirm) replacing old
  4-step wizard
- ImportStepClassify: groups transactions by description, auto-matches existing
  patterns, lets user classify as recurring/once-off/ignore

Deleted old system (18 files):
- Views: ExpensesTab, ProjectedTab, CompareTab, ExpenseCreate/EditView,
  ImportWizardView, compare-views/*, old import-steps (Mapping/Review/Complete)
- Components: ExpenseForm, CashflowChart
- Engines: projection.ts, variance.ts
- Tests: projection.test.ts, variance.test.ts, exportImport.test.ts

Updated:
- Router: single workspace-detail route (no tab children), new import route
- WorkspaceDetailView: embeds WorkspaceDashboard directly, cascade delete
  uses new tables (transactions, patterns, importBatches)
- WorkspaceListView: summaries from transactions instead of expenses, clear-all
  uses new tables
- exportImport.ts: v3 schema with transactions/patterns/importBatches
- matching.ts: removed old 3-pass matching engine, kept utility functions
- models.ts: removed legacy types (Expense, Actual, CategoryMapping, etc.)
- db/index.ts: removed legacy table type stubs
- forecast.ts: removed legacy DailyPoint stubs

Tags: ui, import, forecast, dashboard, cleanup, migration
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: high
Debt: paid
Epic: actuals-first-pivot
Semver: major
